section.p: # source_id: khorumi # title: Khorumi # source_url: https://en.wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&prop=extracts&explaintext=1&format=json&titles=Khorumi # license: CC BY-SA 4.0 # attribution: Wikipe

figure.name: Ingested Figure

step.action: The Khorumi (Georgian: ხორუმი) is a war dance th

figure.step: The Khorumi (Georgian: ხორუმი) is a war dance that originated in the region of Adjara, which is located in the southwestern region of Georgia.

step.action: The dance was originally performed by only a few

figure.step: The dance was originally performed by only a few men.

step.action: In today's version of the Khorumi, 30 to 40 danc

figure.step: In today's version of the Khorumi, 30 to 40 dancers can participate.

step.action: The dance was inscribed on the Intangible Cultur

figure.step: The dance was inscribed on the Intangible Cultural Heritage of Georgia list in 2013.

step.action: Although the number of performers changed, the c

figure.step: Although the number of performers changed, the content of the dance is still the same.

step.action: The dance brings to life the Georgian army of th

figure.step: The dance brings to life the Georgian army of the past centuries.

step.action: A few men who are searching the area for a camps

figure.step: A few men who are searching the area for a campsite and enemy camps perform the initial "prelude" to the dance.

step.action: The dance incorporates in itself the themes of s

figure.step: The dance incorporates in itself the themes of search, war, and the celebration of victory as well as courage and glory of Georgian soldiers.

step.action: Another unique element of Khorumi is that it has

figure.step: Another unique element of Khorumi is that it has a specific rhythm, based on five beat meter (3+2).

step.action: However, over time it has grown in scale.

figure.step: However, over time it has grown in scale.

step.action: Afterwards, they call the army onto the battlefi

figure.step: Afterwards, they call the army onto the battlefield.

step.action: The exit of the army is quite breathtaking.

figure.step: The exit of the army is quite breathtaking.

step.action: Its strength, simple but distinctive movements a

figure.step: Its strength, simple but distinctive movements and the precision of lines create a sense of awe on stage.

step.action: Since Georgia has seen many wars throughout its

figure.step: Since Georgia has seen many wars throughout its history, Khorumi is a call from the past and reminds us that in order to have peace, we must be ready for war.

step.action: Drum (doli) and the bagpipe (chiboni) are two ke

figure.step: Drum (doli) and the bagpipe (chiboni) are two key instruments to accompany Khorumi.
